title: Sabarimala reference hearing: Live updates from Supreme Court - Day 8
description: Intervenors makes submissionsCJI Surya Kant: we respect all eminent persons, jurists etc. but personal opinion is personal opinion Kaul: There is no harm in drawing from all sources. If knowledge and wisdom come from any source, any country, any university, it should be welcomed. We are far too rich as a civilisation not to accept all forms of knowledge and information. Justice Nagarathna: But not from WhatsApp University Kaul: I am not getting into that. I am not into which university is good o
